description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean, rectangular lines and a flat roof. The structure is primarily white with a prominent green section on the roof, possibly representing a green roof or rooftop garden, and two skylights. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front facade, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The building appears to be single-story, with a clear separation between the main living area and an adjoining section. The exterior is smooth and unornamented, emphasizing simplicity and functionality. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat green roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, the main entry area, and the green roof with skylights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green roof section and skylights, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat roof and the separation between the two main building volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the green roof and the building's geometric layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with large glass doors, flush with the facade, no visible steps or porch, minimalist design
